title: More Beautiful Vertical Slabs
description: This mod adds around 300 Vertical Slabs and pulls textures from the block of minecraft vanilla.
body:
This mod adds around 300 Vertical Slabs. **IMPORTANT !** The mod require [Blackwolf Library](https://modrinth.com/mod/blackwolf-library) to work ! The mod extracts textures from their respective vanilla Minecraft block. So they can be overriden with resource packs as usual. Compatible with all resource packs. **CRAFTING** > > - To create these vertical slabs you must first create the Vertical Slab Frame. Below the recipe. > - You can use any slab from the vanilla game for the recipe. > - You can now use the Vertical Slab Frame with a block whose texture you want. Below are some examples. > - Some Vertical Slabs emit light like their respective blocks.

Some Vertical Slabs

![Some Vertical Slabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e3f30aa2ce684666abfbfcc88b50c65ec5725a9.png) ![Some Vertical Slabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a507ca175da93a56d3af092e6936e7e59215c1d_0.webp) ![Some Vertical Slabs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8df72916fe5bb39ddf9b221f1e4db72a96a0a439_0.webp)

Example of Vertical Slab Recipe

![Example 1 Vertical Slab Frame Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1228761df9d8ce40050942f1a6934a74ff7ebcc4.png) ![Example 2 Vertical Slab Frame Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a660aa2dba5621e17832320c1dab07d978debf97.png)

Some crafting examples (from crafting you can get 2 vertical slabs)

Magma Block Vertical Slab

![Magma Block Vertical Slab Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcf79b64b6211f56d65986051b611f1b97b087a6.png)

Obsidian Cry Vertical Slab

![Obsidian Cry Vertical Slab Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f96f36362b2d9240fd7a8205d77cb8eb8378bb9b_0.webp)

Diamond Block Vertical Slab

![Diamond Block Vertical Slab Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5c146b1f023e616fd904ea1cec7ca2ca63664da_0.webp)

Special Vertical Slabs

For some Vertical Slabs you need particular crafting, you can use [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) to see them. They are: Fire Vertical Slab, Fire Soul Vertical Slab, Lava Vertical Slab(2 version), Nether Portal Vertical Slab and Strange Vertical Slab(no texture). ![Partener server host link](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/112d23b8-9986-4823-80de-d312484cf8c8.webp) BisectHosting offers quick, simple and high quality server hosting with over a dozen locations available across the world, ensuring low latency.
